questions.question: Modal passive uses modal + {a1} + past participle.
The plan {a1} if the budget changes.
Negative modal passive: The file {a1} today.
Active: Someone should repair the roof. Passive: The roof {a1}.
Correct the mistake: The task must done. The task {a1}.
